mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_NO , U.USER_ID , U.PASSWORD , U.USER_NAME , U.PHONE , U.EMAIL , U.ROLE , S.STORE_ID , S.STORE_NAME FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN STORES S ON S.OWNER_USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT 'U' || TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(USER_NO, 4, '0') AS DISPLAY_NO
, USER_NO , USER_ID , USER_NAME , PHONE , EMAIL , ROLE , STATUS , CREATED_AT
FROM USERS
WHERE ROLE = 'OWNER'
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND ( USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT USER_NO , USER_ID , USER_NAME , PHONE , EMAIL , ROLE , STATUS , CREATED_AT FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
